channel.title: CyberPulse
channel.description: Executive cyber intelligence briefings on cyber risk, AI threats, infrastructure exposure, and board-level decision-making.

item.title: CyberPulse Daily — The Revenue Surface
item.dc:creator: Tushar Vartak
item.description: A board-level CyberPulse Emerging Risks briefing on payment paths, customer journeys, automation identities, ransomware operations, and resilience as revenue protection.
